name: VHS
description: Analog VHS tape with intermittent tape damage, chroma bleed, and per-scanline noise

wobble.description: Overall amount of tape damage - waves, creases, and head-switching noise. Bursts on and off organically over time.

scanlineNoise.description: Per-scanline fine chroma/luma jitter. Adds the classic horizontal-streak detail.

smear.description: Horizontal chroma smear (color bleed) amount. Positive trails colour to the right (classic VHS), negative trails it to the left.

speed.description: Animation speed of the tape effects.
